title: Trello vs Wrike
description: Compare Trello vs Wrike in July 20. We analyzed features, pricing, user ratings, and real-world performance to help you choose the right project management tool.
verdict: After thorough evaluation, Trello emerges as our recommendation for most users with a 4.2/5 rating compared to 4.2/5. However, the best choice depends on your specific needs. We recommend evaluating both tools against your requirements.

faqs.question: Which is better, Trello or Wrike?
faqs.answer: Based on our detailed comparison, Trello edges ahead with a 4.2/5 rating. Trello excels at Popular kanban-style project management with boards and power-ups, while Wrike is stronger for Enterprise project management platform with robust reporting..

faqs.question: What are the main differences between Trello and Wrike?
faqs.answer: Trello and Wrike differ in pricing (Free–$17.50/user/mo vs $9.80-34.80/mo), target audience, and feature focus. Our comparison table breaks down these differences.

faqs.question: Is Trello cheaper than Wrike?
faqs.answer: Trello starts at Free–$17.50/user/mo while Wrike starts at $9.80-34.80/mo. Consider total cost of ownership including implementation and training.

faqs.question: Which tool has better features, Trello or Wrike?
faqs.answer: Both platforms offer strong features for project management. Trello scores higher overall, but specific feature needs may favor one over the other.

faqs.question: Can I use Trello and Wrike together?
faqs.answer: Many organizations use both tools for complementary purposes. However, for overlapping use cases, choosing one streamlines workflows.

faqs.question: Which is easier to use, Trello or Wrike?
faqs.answer: Both Trello and Wrike prioritize user experience. The best choice depends on your team's technical expertise and workflow preferences.

faqs.question: Which platform has better customer support?
faqs.answer: Both offer documentation and support tiers. The quality varies by plan level — check our detailed review for support comparisons.

faqs.question: Which project management tool is best for my team size?
faqs.answer: Enterprise features favor Wrike for large teams, while Trello may be more suitable for smaller teams with its Free–$17.50/user/mo pricing.
